message:
test(cli,lint): coverage boost — generateAssignmentsEnhanced, LintWithRedaction, getConfigInt

CLI: 17 tests for all 5 strategy branches (round-robin, quality, speed,
dependency, balanced) of generateAssignmentsEnhanced. Covers common fields,
edge cases (no agents, no beads, more beads than agents), and default strategy
fallthrough. generateAssignmentsEnhanced: 0% → 82.4%.

Lint: LintWithRedaction with configured redactor (42.9% → 100%), getConfigInt
all type branches (50% → 100%), oversized prompt bytes/tokens thresholds.
Lint overall: 89.9% → 96.3%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
